It must include one package that acts as a Vite plugin for Convex and gives each coding agent an isolated environment, plus another package that behaves like an Oxlint plugin detecting unused Convex functions left behind by AI agents. Include package files, source files, example usage, and short safety notes.

results.prompt: Create a VS Code extension that auto-fixes Tailwind CSS canonical class suggestions on save. It must listen to Tailwind CSS IntelliSense diagnostics shaped like 'The class ... can be written as ...', replace the class before save, expose a tailwindCanonicalClasses.fixOnSave setting, and include extension package metadata.

results.response: **Yes** — if you go ahead and change some class names, like making the text extra large, like saying 5xl, or making it underline, as soon as you get back to the browser, you'll be able to see changes instantly thanks to nex.js's hot module replacement. _(source: https://nextjs.org/docs/app/guides/migrating/from-create-react-app)_

results.prompt: Build a runnable kanban board preview inspired by bleeding-edge full-stack TypeScript. It must visibly include Trellix-style columns, draggable-looking task cards, tRPC procedure/status panel, Auth.js session area, Turso/libSQL database status, realtime activity, and setup reminders for TURSO_URL, TURSO_ACCESS_TOKEN, and AUTH_SECRET.

dom.title: Trellix tRPC Board
dom.text:
BLEEDING-EDGE TYPESCRIPT KANBAN

Trellix tRPC Board

A runnable Trellix-style kanban board preview with draggable-looking task cards, tRPC procedure status, Auth.js session state, Turso/libSQL database health, realtime activity, and setup reminders for TURSO_URL, TURSO_ACCESS_TOKEN, and AUTH_SECRET.

TRELLIX
Kanban preview
TRPC
Procedures ready
AUTH.JS
Session active
TURSO
libSQL healthy
KANBAN
Backlog column

Seeded cards look draggable and show priority, assignee, and due date metadata.

TRPC
Procedure status panel

Board queries and mutation names are listed so the API surface is visible.

AUTH.JS
Session area

Mock sign-in state shows how board ownership and member access will be enforced.

TURSO
Database status

Turso/libSQL connection cards call out TURSO_URL and TURSO_ACCESS_TOKEN setup.

AUTH_SECRET
Environment checklist

AUTH_SECRET, GitHub OAuth, and database push reminders sit next to the preview.

REALTIME
Activity feed

Realtime activity explains card moves, comments, and sync events as the board changes.

Action loop
Move kanban card
Call tRPC mutation
Check Turso status
Review AUTH_SECRET
